Here's the continuous-task spec:

```
[CREATE_CONTINUOUS name="fenced" work_dir="/tmp/robyx-test-workspace/fenced"]
[CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
{
  "objective": "Macro wrapped in a triple-backtick fence.",
  "success_criteria": ["fences are removed when they only wrap the macro"],
  "first_step": {"number": 1, "description": "start"}
}
[/CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
```

Let me know if you want changes.
